chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No. D-6018 of 2021 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. ------------------ 02.11.2021 M/s. Muhammad Zahid and Abdul Moeed Zahid, Advocates for petitioner. Mr. Meeran Muhammad Shah, Additional Advocate General. ------------------ It is case of the petitioner that on 16th April, 2018 he moved an application to respondent No. 4 [Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Gulzar-e-Hijri, District Karachi- East] for demarcation and joint survey of the subject property i.e. Agricultural Land admeasuring 1.10 Acres, situated in Survey No. 83, Deh Gujhro, Tapo Songal, Scheme No. 33, Gulzar-e-Hijri, Karachi-East but despite laps of sufficient time needful has not been done. Learned Additional Advocate General states that this petition may be disposed of by directing the respondent No. 4 to take necessary step on the application of the petitioner and conduct demarcation/joint survey of the subject property within sixty days. Learned counsel for the petitioner records his consent to the proposition of learned Additional Advocate General. We; therefore, dispose of this petition by directing respondent No. 4 to act upon the aforementioned application of the petitioner and demarcate the subject property in accordance with the relevant provisions of Sindh Land Revenue Act, 1967 within a period of sixty days hereof and submit such compliance report before this Court through MIT-II of this Court. Office is directed to communicate a copy of this order to respondent No. 4 for information and compliance. Petition stands dispose of. JUDGE JUDGE Athar Zai
